title.rendered: Vote for Travel FX: Help Us Win Big at the British Travel Awards!

content.rendered:
For the sixth year running, we’re thrilled to announce that Travel FX has been nominated for Best Retailer for Forex/Travel Money Retailer at the prestigious British Travel Awards – often referred to as the Oscars of the travel industry. This recognition is a testament to the quality service we provide to our valued customers.

The Challenge

We are up against the biggest companies in the industry and face the challenge that many smaller retailers and online companies face, that we just don’t have the exposure of shops on every high street or the number of sales that the bigger players have.

The current gold award holder The Post Office is certainly the biggest in the industry and has dominated the voting over the past years, but our commitment to the best prices on currencies and 5-star excellent service is incomparable to theirs and makes us proud competitors and very worthy contenders.

Why Vote for Us?

Your vote can make a huge difference. It helps us stand out in a competitive field and continues to push us towards excellence. Plus, voting is quick and easy – and you could win fantastic prizes!

Amazing Prizes Up for Grabs

When you vote, you’ll be automatically entered into a generous prize draw. Here are just a few of the incredible prizes you could win:

  • £5,000 European villa holiday
  • £5,000 Greek Island holiday voucher
  • 8 days in Lake Garda for 2
  • 8-day European Cruise for 2
  • 7-night Scandinavia Explorer Cruise
  • A magical trip to Lapland
  • Holiday for 2 to Experience the Highlights of Turkey
  • 15-night Winter Sun Cruise for 2
  • £1,000 Holiday Voucher from TUI
  • £1,000 Holiday Voucher from Hays Travel
  • £500 Holiday Voucher
  • £500 Travel Money
  • £500 Coach Holiday Voucher
  • Return Ferry Trip to Spain for up to 4 plus a car
  • Mini Cruise for two to Rotterdam or Amsterdam
  • Hotel and Parking at major UK Airports
  • Family Holiday for up to 8 People at a Holiday Park
  • £750 Luxury Coastal Holiday Voucher
  • Narrowboat short break for up to 6 people
  • 4-day Dutch Bulb Fields River Cruise for 2
  • 7-night stay in a lodge or villa at a Holiday Park
  • 7-day Activity Holiday on the Island of Lefkada
  • £200 Travel Insurance Vouchers
  • A family holiday for up to 8 people with Lyons Holiday Parks

Our Commitment to You

Our dedication to offering low prices and excellent service is reflected in our Trustpilot reviews. We work hard to ensure every customer has a positive experience with us, and this nomination is a reflection of that commitment.

How to Vote

Voting for us is simple and only takes a few moments. If you think we deserve to win and want a chance to bag some incredible prizes, please take a moment to cast your vote.

Thank you for your continued support and good luck in the prize draw!

Vote for Travel FX Now!

Stay tuned for more updates and thank you for being a part of our journey.

Best regards,
The Travel FX Team

Click here for more information about the prizes.

itemListElement.name: Vote for Travel FX: Help Us Win Big at the British Travel Awards!

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
